title: Assam Chief Minister Oath Ceremony Highlights: Himanta Sarma, 4 Ministers Sworn In
description: Assam Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Along with Himanta Biswa Sarma, four ministers - two from the BJP and one each from its allies Asom Gana Parishad (AGP) and Bodoland People's Front (BPF) - will also be sworn in.
